positive: A highly detailed botanical illustration of various exotic tropical leaves (monstera, philodendron, palm) arranged in a symmetrical, elegant wreath pattern. Watercolor style, deep emerald and forest green color palette, clean white background, vector art quality, studio lighting, trending on Pinterest.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, oversaturated, grunge, sketch, photography
